description: One candidate item-set group for LoadAwardCandBin. Describes a random-choice pool of items: either pick one (m_bRandChoose=true) or give all. Written by MarshalBasicData / read by UnmarshalBasicData.

serialized_layout.name: m_bRandChoose
serialized_layout.description: 1 = randomly pick one item from the pool; 0 = award all items.

serialized_layout.name: item_count
serialized_layout.description: Number of ITEM_WANTED entries that follow (stored as single byte, max ~255).

serialized_layout.name: items
serialized_layout.description: Array of item entries. See item_wanted.json for field layout.

notes: item_count is stored as a single byte (char), not a uint32. Maximum practical value is bounded by MAX_AWARD_CANDIDATES=16.
m_ulAwardCmnItems and m_ulAwardTskItems are derived at runtime by counting m_bCommonItem flags — they are NOT stored in the binary.
